meta.note: Real projects demonstrating AI systems architecture at production scale

achievements.title: Ascend: 15-Agent Autonomous Orchestration System
achievements.description: Trust-gated L0-L4 orchestration across 4 production projects. 15 agents built, 11 mature, with policy engine and cost controls.

achievements.title: Crest: Signal-Driven AI Development Platform
achievements.description: 8-agent pipeline with Thompson Sampling, multi-model routing, and signal-driven development methodology.

achievements.title: Enterprise: Multi-Project Delivery at Scale
achievements.description: 3 concurrent client projects across 9+ repositories. Healthcare, Web3, and content platforms serving 10k+ users.
